findings.description: Section entity title is 'こ16進数' (bare term) but the image shows lesson label '09-01 数値の数え方' as the enclosing heading. section_number '09-01' is correct; the bare title is a reasonable abstraction, not a factual error.

Binary-number table is rendered as a single flat row with 11 cells. The image shows numbers with carry annotations (桁上がる／桁になる) inline. The JSON correctly encodes annotations in the jp cell text; representation is faithful.

reviewer_notes: All major content blocks are present and accurate: 2進数 table (11 values with carry annotations), 16進数 section + definition term (A–F mapping, carry rule), 16進数 table (0–F plus 10 with carry note), 'なぜ複数の表記法' section, and IC (集積回路) term with definition. Both zh and en translations are semantically correct. No high- or med-severity findings.
